title: BuildPayload
description: The build notification payload containing information about an application build or deployment.

apiKey.description: The Bugsnag API key for the project. Found in project settings on the Bugsnag dashboard.

appVersion.description: The version of the application being built or deployed.

appVersionCode.description: The version code of the application, typically used for Android applications.

appBundleVersion.description: The bundle version of the application, typically used for iOS applications.

releaseStage.description: The release stage for this build (e.g., production, staging, development). Defaults to production if not specified.

builderName.description: The name of the person or system that created this build. If not provided, defaults to the machine's username.

sourceControl.description: Source control information for the build, used to link errors to specific commits and repositories.

repository.description: The URL of the source control repository.

revision.description: The source control revision or commit hash for this build.

diff.description: A URL to the diff between this build and the previous one.

metadata.description: Custom metadata to associate with the build. This data is stored alongside the release information in the Bugsnag dashboard.

autoAssignRelease.description: Whether to automatically assign this build as a release. Defaults to true.
